title: Risk Review Meeting — 2024-11-06

# Risk Review Meeting — 2024-11-06

**Attendees:** Felix Herrera, Tyler Moss, Rowan Ellery, Aisha Mbeki

## Summary

This page covers the battery chemistry evaluation for the Battery subsystem. Key items discussed and actions agreed are recorded here.
